title: Sleep & Wind Down
subtitle: Let the day go. Rest is enough.

cues.text:
Lie down comfortably.
Let your arms fall softly at your sides.
Close your eyes.

Take a slow, gentle breath in through your nose...
and let it go, slowly, through your mouth.

Again, in...
and a long... slow... out.
Let your body feel heavy.

You made it through the day.
Whatever happened, it's done.
There is nothing left to solve tonight.

Feel the surface beneath you, supporting your weight completely.
Let yourself... be held.

Start at the top of your head.
Notice your scalp... your forehead. Let them soften.

Your eyes, let them relax, sinking back gently.
Your jaw, let it loosen... teeth slightly apart.

Your neck and shoulders, let them melt downward.
Your chest, let it rise and fall without any effort.

Your arms... your hands.
Your belly, let it be soft.
Your lower back... your hips.

Your legs, heavy and still.
Your feet, let them go... completely.
Your whole body... is resting now.

If thoughts come, that's okay.
Just watch them like clouds passing through a quiet sky.
They don't need your attention. You can let them drift.

Breathe slowly.
In... and out.
In... and out.

You're safe. You're warm. The day is done.
All that's left now... is rest.

Let yourself drift.
Deeper and deeper into quiet.
Softer... and softer.
